rows.label: qev013305_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Yo, did you come to save
me? Sorry for the trouble...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0002
rows.name:
Tch! I couldn't protect anyone, and
I even needlessly exposed other
BLADEs to danger... I'm the worst.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_JNK0010
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev013305_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Corondas he isn't worthless.

rows.label: qev013305_JNK0020
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev013305_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell Corondas that kind of
attitude makes him worthless.

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0003
rows.name:
The other squad members are wiped out.
Everyone was killed by that demon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0004
rows.name:
For me alone to survive so
pathetically... I can't forgive
myself! Dammit! How miserable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0005
rows.name:
That's right... curse me more. Dammit!
Why was I the only one who survived.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0006
rows.name:
The other squad members are wiped
out! Everyone was killed by that
demon! Dammit! How miserable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0007
rows.name:
..."If the black Doll shows up, I'll
run away at full speed..." Some of
them joked around like Peter did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0008
rows.name:
Life is the most precious thing...
that would've been fine. And yet,
that bastard Galileo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0009
rows.name:
Everyone... tried to act as a shield
to let me escape, and took the
bullets of that black demon...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0010
rows.name:
What am I doing when I was
supposed to protect them!! Ah!
I... I should have died instead![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_JNK0030
rows.name: Admonish

rows.label: qev013305_SEL0031
rows.name:
Encourage Corondas to
get back on his feet.

rows.label: qev013305_JNK0040
rows.name: Berate

rows.label: qev013305_SEL0041
rows.name:
Reprimand Corondas for
wallowing in self-pity.

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0011
rows.name: I appreciate you saying that, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0012
rows.name:
...But I no longer
have... my comrades...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0013
rows.name: You're strong... But... I'm already...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0014
rows.name:
...What? There's something
I have to do...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Only I... can revive
Corondas's team... huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0016
rows.name: Right... is that bastard Bates safe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0017
rows.name:
...I see. So there's still a greenhorn
who needs my strict training...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0018
rows.name:
You're right... What am I doing not keeping
it together at a time like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0019
rows.name:
We're Corondas's team, the ones
who overcome any hardship with our
frontier spirit, aren't we...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Let's see how they move
at the cave entrance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0022
rows.name:
...I have to survive no matter what...
And carry all the feelings of the guys
who got killed back to NLA...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Did that thing give
up and go home already?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0024
rows.name: As if!! You little insects!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0025
rows.name:
You should have just thrown yourselves
out and gotten killed quietly like
those guys from earlier![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0026
rows.name:
Coming all the way out here, sniffing
around things you don't need to know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0027
rows.name:
And on top of that, scurrying away and
causing me trouble... Hey, who do you
think you are? For lower lifeforms!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0028
rows.name:
If it's such a bother, leave
us alone. No one wants attention
from a scumbag like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0029
rows.name:
Hmph! Acting tough after abandoning
your subordinates and running away.
Your subordinates were all talk too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0030
rows.name:
"As long as Captain Corondas is alive,
our hope... our dreams will definitely
be realized. Dying isn't scary at all."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0031
rows.name:
...How was that? An imitation
of that guy named Galileo. Ahaha!
It sounded like him, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0032
rows.name:
I took my time killing him! He was crying
and screaming at the end, though![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0033
rows.name: Guh... you bastard...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0034
rows.name:
I'll crush all the hopes and dreams of
you lower lifeforms! I'm looking forward
to seeing how much you can endure![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0035
rows.name:
...[ST:playername ]. I'll handle the small fry.
Can you... take that one?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_JNK0050
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev013305_SEL0051
rows.name: Nod and give a confident thumbs-up.

rows.label: qev013305_JNK0060
rows.name: Refrain

rows.label: qev013305_SEL0061
rows.name: Suggest a cautious approach.

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0036
rows.name:
Heh... Good answer. Then
let's start the mission![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0037
rows.name:
Heh... Were you always
such a cautious person?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0038
rows.name:
But we have to do it. Then
let's start the mission![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0039
rows.name: Oh my, you are...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0040
rows.name:
I see. So you came all this way
just to become my collection.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0041
rows.name:
Fufu, then as you wish, I'll skewer you
and make you taste every kind of agony!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0042
rows.name:
Here I come, insects!! I'll
make you regret being born!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0043
rows.name:
That was amazing fighting... You
really defeated that demon...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0044
rows.name:
Thank you. With this, the guys who got
killed are at least somewhat avenged.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_JNK0070
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev013305_SEL0071
rows.name: Remind Corondas of his promise.

rows.label: qev013305_JNK0080
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev013305_SEL0081
rows.name:
Ask Corondas about the
dream Tempera mentioned.

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0045
rows.name:
...You're right. The dream
those guys entrusted to me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0046
rows.name:
That promise from that day, to completely
strip bare this mystery-filled Planet Mira...
I have to fulfill it no matter what.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0047
rows.name:
When we formed Corondas's team, we all
swore. That we'd completely strip bare
this mystery-filled Planet Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0048
rows.name:
...I mean, look around, it's uncharted
territory everywhere. There's nothing
happier for an explorer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0049
rows.name:
Yeah... Our dreams are
packed into this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0051
rows.name:
Alright... let's head back
to NLA. I need to rebuild
Corondas's team immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0052
rows.name:
Combat ability, judgment, an
unbreakable heart... You have
everything a BLADE needs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0053
rows.name:
From this incident, I fully
understand that you're even more
amazing than the stories say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0054
rows.name:
Heh... But Corondas's team won't lose
either! We're the ones who will unravel
all the mysteries of Planet Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0056
rows.name:
...Yo, did you come to save
me? Sorry for the trouble...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0057
rows.name:
Tch! I couldn't protect anyone, and
I even needlessly exposed other
BLADEs to danger... I'm the worst.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_JNK0090
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev013305_SEL0091
rows.name: Tell Corondas he isn't worthless.

rows.label: qev013305_JNK0100
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev013305_SEL0101
rows.name:
Tell Corondas that kind of
attitude makes him worthless.

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0058
rows.name:
The other squad members are wiped out.
Everyone was killed by that demon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0059
rows.name:
For me alone to survive so
pathetically... I can't forgive
myself! Dammit! How miserable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0060
rows.name:
That's right... curse me more. Dammit!
Why was I the only one who survived.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0061
rows.name:
The other squad members are wiped
out! Everyone was killed by that
demon! Dammit! How miserable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0062
rows.name:
..."If the black Doll shows up, I'll
run away at full speed..." Some of
them joked around like Peter did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0063
rows.name:
Life is the most precious thing...
that would've been fine. And yet,
that bastard Galileo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0064
rows.name:
Everyone... tried to act as a shield
to let me escape, and took the
bullets of that black demon...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0065
rows.name:
What am I doing when I was
supposed to protect them!! Ah!
I... I should have died instead![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0090
rows.name: Right... is that bastard Bates safe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0071
rows.name:
...What? He kicked the bucket
in the Black Steel Continent?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0072
rows.name:
Guh... I have nothing. There's
nothing left of Corondas's team![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0073
rows.name:
Then at least... I have to launch
this final life... as an offering
to the guys who died.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0074
rows.name: ...I'm going.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0075
rows.name:
I'll show that thing one last time...
what Corondas's team is all about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0076
rows.name:
...That bastard! Where did it go!
Did it tuck its tail and run? Hey!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0077
rows.name:
Hah! What a noisy
insect! Die right now!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0078
rows.name:
Hah! So you casually showed up! I
thought you got scared and ran away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0079
rows.name:
Oh my, acting tough after abandoning
your subordinates and running away.
Your subordinates were all talk too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0080
rows.name:
"As long as Captain Corondas is alive,
our hope... our dreams will definitely
be realized. Dying isn't scary at all."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0081
rows.name:
...How was that? An imitation
of that guy named Galileo. Ahaha!
It sounded like him, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0082
rows.name:
I took my time killing him! He was crying
and screaming at the end, though![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0083
rows.name:
Guh... I will never forgive
you... I'll make you taste the
pain my comrades suffered!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0084
rows.name: Uwaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0085
rows.name: Ahahahahahahaha!! Fragile! Too fragile!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0086
rows.name:
At least entertain me a little more
before you die! Insects are completely
useless even at the very end![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0087
rows.name:
Guys like this aren't even worth skewering
and turning into specimens! I'll exterminate
you without a second thought![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013305_MSG0088
rows.name:
Here I come, insects!! I'll
make you regret being born!![ST:wait ]
